subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The Most Exalted Pen is moved to extol and glorify the Lord of Names, inasmuch as His grace is manifest and His hand of power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قلم اعلی بحمد و ثنای مالک اسما ناطق چه که فضلش ظاهر و ید اقتدارش
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
